name: Endless looping in horrendous dungeon
description:
Proceed if you crave torment.

You accidentally shattered the Curse Crystal in the dungeon's depths, binding your soul to infinite resurrection at this exact spot. The dungeon awoke furious: slimes melt you alive, tentacles oviposit eggs that burst from within, mimics rape and dismember, parasites puppeteer your flesh, insects vore you from the inside out...

Every path loops back, horrors escalate with each loop. Graphic pain, gore, violation, and reluctant pleasure await. No victories, no mercy, no escape—only endless, varied deaths screaming for more. Pure NSFW horror.
creator: Redsuns
